title: Property Consultant - Mahagun Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mahagun Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!
